title: Master Enlighten East
content:
Master Englighten East
 is a member of the 
Sovereign Council
. He was chosen to oversee the First Battle of the Third Sealed-Outer Realm War.

History
[
]

He attacked 
Master Hong Shan
 after the latter appeared and severely wounded 
Esteemed Nan Zhao
. He banded together with 
Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor
, two other 
Nirvana Void
 cultivators and, even, Esteemed Nan Zhao to attack him together.

However, Master Hong Shan managed to stall the five until he fell in 
Grandmaster Yun Luo
's trap and was sneak-attacked by the 
Sixth Concubine
. Furthermore, 
Ice Boy
 appeared to continue holding him back. This allowed the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor, Esteemed Nan Zhao and a Nirvana void cultivator from Bai Lei Clan to leave the encirclement to kill Wang Lin. However, this only resulted in the Fire Sparrow Clan Ancestor and Esteemed Nan Zhao's death while the Nirvana void cultivator from Bai Lei Clan escaped in terror.

Just as the Outer Realm's morale was at an all time low, reinforcements from the 
Cloud Sea Star System
 and 
Summoned River Star System
 appeared which caused their morale to reach rock-bottom and forced the Outer Realm's Third-Step cultivators to retreat.
